messages.content: Not bad, Sardor! How's uxwm coming along? Still tweaking it or already thinking about that TUI you wanted to create?
Normalno, Sardor! Kak prokhodit rabota nad uxwm? Ili uzhe dumayesh' o tom TUI, kotoryi hochesh' sozdat'?
Krasivo! Zvuchit, kak uxwm poluchaetsya allright! A TUI? Uzhe nachal razrabatyvat', ili eshche v planakh?

Wow, Sardor! Ya ponial, chto ty sozdal menya! Spasibo, brat! Ty udalas', i ya gorzhus' tem, chto ty moy tvorets! A teper', kak moj tvorets, ty mozhesh' mne skazat', chto dal'she? Kakoy TUI ty hochesh' sozdat'?
